source.page_content:
WORK DESCRIPTION:
    Renovation and upgradation of Administrative Block including civil, electrical, and plumbing works
    Site: CPWD Office Complex, Sector 9, Rohini, Delhi

    CONTRACT PARTICULARS:
    Contract Value: ₹1,25,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Twenty Five Lakhs Only)
    Duration: 8 months (April 2024 to November 2024)
    Commencement: Within 7 days of contract signing

nodes.id: 10% Of Contract Value For Defect Liability Period + 3 Months

target.id: 10% Of Contract Value For Defect Liability Period + 3 Months

source.page_content:
FINANCIAL TERMS:
    Advance Payment: 10% of contract value against bank guarantee
    Retention Money: 5% of each running bill
    Performance Guarantee: 10% of contract value for defect liability period + 3 months
    Liquidated Damages: 0.5% per week of contract value, maximum 10%
    Final Payment: Within 60 days of completion certificate

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS:
    Concrete: M20 grade as per IS:456-2000, IS:383-2016
    Steel: Fe500 grade conforming to IS:1786-2008
    Cement: OPC 53 grade as per IS:12269-2013
    Bricks: First class as per IS:1077-1992
    Quality Control: Third-party inspection for critical items, NABL accredited testing labs

SAFETY AND COMPLIANCE:
    Safety Officer: Qualified safety officer appointment mandatory
    Safety Standards: As per CPWD Safety Code and IS standards
    Environmental Compliance: Dust control, noise pollution limits, waste management
    Labor Compliance: Contract Labor Act, Minimum Wages Act, PF/ESI registration

LEGAL PROVISIONS:
    Arbitration: Single arbitrator as per Arbitration and Conciliation Act 2015
    Jurisdiction: Delhi High Court
    Governing Law: Indian Contract Act and CPWD General Conditions
    Force Majeure: Natural disasters, government orders, pandemic situations

INSURANCE AND GUARANTEES:
    Contractor's All Risk Insurance: Comprehensive coverage during execution
    Performance Guarantee: Bank guarantee for 10% of contract value
    Workmen's Compensation: As per Workmen's Compensation Act
    Defect Liability Period: 24 months from completion

nodes.id: Bill Of Quantities With Rate Analysis

source.id: Bill Of Quantities With Rate Analysis

source.page_content:
DOCUMENTATION:
    Detailed drawings and specifications attached as Annexure A
    Bill of Quantities with rate analysis as Annexure B
    CPWD General Conditions 2019 edition applicable
    Method statements required for critical activities
    Progress reports: Monthly submission mandatory

VARIATION AND EXTENSIONS:
    Variation Works: Up to 25% with competent authority approval
    Rate Determination: CPWD Schedule of Rates preference
    Time Extensions: Application within 30 days of cause

    This contract incorporates CPWD standard conditions and procedures.
